assertions.reason: Blocked on assistant output: after sending a prompt without any wiki path text ("Which wiki page should I open for TypeScript?") and waiting 8s, no assistant message was rendered, so the contract requirement (assistant message containing wiki page path) could not be exercised.

frictions: agent-browser network capture listed page/API requests but did not surface chat transport details (likely websocket), so assistant-output absence was validated via rendered UI evidence instead.
blockers: Pi Agent assistant output unavailable in this environment; without an assistant message, VAL-WIRE-003 cannot be fully executed per contract.
notes: VAL-WIRE-003 is blocked due to missing assistant response; clickable wiki-link behavior for assistant messages could not be validated end-to-end.
